name: kamiyo
description: Solana escrow with dispute resolution for API payments. Also supports x402 HTTP 402 payments (USDC on Base/Polygon/Arbitrum/Solana).

agent_private_key.title: Agent Private Key
agent_private_key.description: Base58 or JSON array private key for signing transactions

tools.name: create_escrow
tools.description: Create payment escrow with time lock and dispute capability

tools.name: check_escrow_status
tools.description: Check escrow account status and details

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Verify payment received and escrow active

tools.name: estimate_refund
tools.description: Calculate refund based on quality score

tools.name: file_dispute
tools.description: File on-chain dispute for poor quality data

tools.name: get_api_reputation
tools.description: Get API provider reputation and history

tools.name: call_api_with_escrow
tools.description: Full flow: escrow, call, assess, auto-dispute

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch from x402 endpoint with USDC payment
